title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Accept the Deed of Donation Being Made by Rhoda Subdivision Neighborhood Homeowners Association (RSNHA), Barangay Anos, Los Baños, Laguna for the Donation of Road Lots and Open Spaces and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 04/26/2021)
